title: Instant Rejected
description: A psychological horror mod where curiosity leads to immediate consequences and a hostile entity awaits.
body:
This mod was created in mcreator.

Instant Rejected
Instant Rejected is a psychological horror-themed Minecraft mod designed to challenge the player's curiosity. It introduces a subtle yet unsettling atmosphere where every action has a definitive consequence.

Features & Mechanics
The Starting Burden: Upon entering the world, a unique global trigger automatically places a mysterious object into the player's inventory(Only on versions 1.0.1 and above.). You don't choose to find it; it finds you.

Psychological Triggers: Interacting with the mod's core elements initiates a series of sensory distortions and procedural events that escalate over time.

Atmospheric Advancements: Hidden milestones are included to track the player's descent into the mod's lore, rewarding exploration within a 32-block radius of certain entities.

Technical Details
Optimized Procedures: Uses lightweight tick-counting logic to ensure zero impact on server performance.

Server-Privileged Execution: Mechanics are handled through high-priority commands to ensure consistent behavior across singleplayer and multiplayer environments.

Environment: Compatible with most modern modpacks and designed to work seamlessly with standard shaders for an enhanced horror experience.

Instant Threat Entity: Unlike other horror mods, the entity in this mod does not wait. It spawns abruptly and is immediately aggressive. It is designed for combat and jump-scares rather than stalking.

Use this shader for the best experience: 

https://modrinth.com/shader/bliss-shader
(This shader is not mine)
